title: Windchill: Tailoring Change Management
description: Plan and implement a tailored change management process. Create custom change objects, configure business rules, modify workflows and life cycles, and test the complete change process.

modules.title: Pieces of the Puzzle
modules.description: Identify the change objects and administrative elements used in Windchill change management. Understand the out-of-the-box change process, roles, and how to plan modifications.

modules.title: Plan for Change
modules.description: Create custom change objects and user-defined groups. Configure change management preferences, task form templates, association rules, mapping rules, and change intent.

modules.title: Tailor the Change Process
modules.description: Modify existing workflows and life cycles to support a custom change process. Create object initialization rules to connect workflows with life cycles.

modules.title: Test the New Process
modules.description: Verify that a custom change process functions correctly. Create change objects, follow the workflow, and validate that life cycle states progress as expected.
